title: Ruby Encrusted Golden Tools & Armor
description: This texture pack changes gold tools & armor to be encrusted with ruby gems. Overall it makes gold tools look fancier.
body:
This texture pack changes gold tools & armor to be encrusted with pink gems. Overall it makes gold tools look fancier.

Bedrock Edition download here:
https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/ruby-encrusted-golden-tools-bedrock/

Notes:
Faithful 32x version do not include armor
